text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Damage to a building in Misgav Am following a Hebzollah rocket attack. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党火箭弹袭击后，米斯加夫阿姆（Misgav Am）的一栋建筑受损。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated Russia's Defense Ministry claims air defenses shot down 151 Ukrainian drones overnight. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯国防部声称，防空系统昨晚击落了151架乌克兰无人机。推文

text: WarTranslated Ukraine's National Guard, Air Force, and 15th Artillery Reconnaissance Brigade ran a large-scale operation in the Zaporizhzhia sector, taking out a Russian S-300 system and a drone control point. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042518931684872535/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰国民警卫队、空军和第15炮兵侦察旅在扎波罗热地区开展了一次大规模行动，摧毁了俄罗斯的S-300系统和一个无人机控制点。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042518931684872535/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel UK's Defence Secretary Healey: The UK to publish defense investment plan as soon as we can. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042518555590045851/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel UAE presidential adviser Anwar Gargash says the UAE will reassess its regional and global ties and focus on identifying dependable partners. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042518028999409799/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 阿联酋总统顾问安瓦尔·加尔加什表示，阿联酋将重新评估其区域和全球关系，并专注于确定可靠的合作伙伴。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042518028999409799/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Key takeaways from Zelensky's press talk – Russia wants to take Druzhkivka, Kostiantynivka and Pokrovsk by end of April but Zelensky says it's not happening, backed by UK intel. Ukraine is killing as many Russians monthly as Russia mobilizes, but Moscow keeps pulling from its strategic reserves. A fresh batch of Patriot missiles just arrived from partners. Ukrainian drone experts deployed to the Middle East and shot down Iranian Shaheds with interceptors in several countries. Ukraine signed 10-year security deals with three countries and is in talks with Oman, Kuwait and Bahrain, hoping to get oil or diesel in return. Russia is throttling Telegram to push through unpopular moves – either ending the war or ramping up mobilization. If Russia picks de-escalation, a trilateral meeting could happen in April, May or June. Zelensky warns it'll be very tough for Ukraine until September – both on the front and diplomatically, as the US shifts focus to elections. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 泽连斯基新闻发布会的关键要点——俄罗斯希望在4月底前占领德鲁日基夫卡（Druzhkivka）、康斯坦丁诺夫卡（Kostiantynivka）和波克罗夫斯克（Pokrovsk），但泽连斯基表示这不会发生，英国情报部门也支持这一观点。乌克兰每月消灭的俄罗斯人数量与俄罗斯动员的人数相当，但莫斯科仍在不断动用其战略储备。合作伙伴刚刚运来了一批新的爱国者导弹。乌克兰无人机专家被部署到中东，并在多个国家使用拦截器击落了伊朗的“见证者”（Shahed）无人机。乌克兰与三个国家签署了为期10年的安全协议，并正在与阿曼、科威特和巴林进行谈判，希望换取石油或柴油。俄罗斯正在限制Telegram以推行不受欢迎的举措——要么结束战争，要么加强动员。如果俄罗斯选择缓和局势，三方会议可能会在4月、5月或6月举行。泽连斯基警告称，直到9月，乌克兰在战场和外交上都将非常艰难，因为美国将重心转向了选举。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @YemeniFatima : 1/ The Washington-Tehran ceasefire has not sidelined the Houthis; it provided them a platform to attempt a rewrite of the Gulf’s security. My latest on how Houthis are using the current pause to entrench a permanent "Axis" veto over the Red Sea https://www.ideologymachine.com/p/ceasefire-iran-and-the-houthi-victory tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @YemeniFatima : 1/ 华盛顿-德黑兰停火协议并没有让胡塞武装靠边站；它为他们提供了一个试图重写海湾地区安全格局的平台。我关于胡塞武装如何利用当前的停火来巩固对红海的永久“轴心”否决权的最新文章 https://www.ideologymachine.com/p/ceasefire-iran-and-the-houthi-victory 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon’s MTV reports that during intense Israeli strikes in Beirut, several IRGC operatives were killed while directing Hezbollah operations. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩MTV报道称，在以色列对贝鲁特进行猛烈空袭期间，几名伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）特工在指挥真主党行动时被杀。推文

text: WarTranslated Putin's envoy Kirill Dmitriev is heading to the US for talks with Trump's team, Reuters reports. The visit comes just before a decision on whether to extend eased Russian oil sanctions expiring April 11. https://www.reuters.com/world/europe/russian-special-envoy-dmitriev-us-meeting-trump-administration-members-sources-2026-04-09/ tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 路透社报道，普京特使基里尔·德米特里耶夫（Kirill Dmitriev）正前往美国与特朗普团队进行会谈。此次访问正值是否延长将于4月11日到期的俄罗斯石油制裁的决定做出之前。 https://www.reuters.com/world/europe/russian-special-envoy-dmitriev-us-meeting-trump-administration-members-sources-2026-04-09/ 推文

text: Open Source Intel Russian-flagged tanker has completed its passage through the Strait of Hormuz, continuing its route without reported disruption. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042513980728476043/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一艘俄罗斯籍油轮已完成通过霍尔木兹海峡的航行，继续其航线，未见异常报告。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042513980728476043/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated "GO VOTE FOR VIKTOR ORBAN. I'M WITH HIM ALL THE WAY!" Trump writes on Truth Social. Totally not election interference. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042513173526307241/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated “去投票给维克多·欧尔班吧。我全力支持他！”特朗普在Truth Social上写道。这绝对不是选举干预。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042513173526307241/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah commander Hezbollah Hajj Abu Mustafa Sabouri confirmed killed in an Israeli strike in Beirut; his body has been identified. Third commander confirmed dead in the recent strike wave, with funeral set for today in Lebanon following the operation attributed to Israel. @LebOSINT tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党指挥官哈吉·阿布·穆斯塔法·萨布里（Hajj Abu Mustafa Sabouri）被证实在一场以色列对贝鲁特的空袭中丧生；其遗体已被确认。这是近期空袭浪潮中确认死亡的第三位指挥官，葬礼定于今天在黎巴嫩举行，此次行动被归咎于以色列。 @LebOSINT 推文

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇺🇦 "Russia will not give such gifts to anyone." Moscow will respond to any hostile actions of Kiev, and the Armed Forces of Ukraine will not be able to use the Easter truce to gain military advantages, Russian Ambassador At Large Miroshnik stated 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇺🇦 “俄罗斯不会给任何人这样的礼物。”俄罗斯无任所大使米罗什尼克表示，莫斯科将对基辅的任何敌对行动做出回应，乌克兰武装部队将无法利用复活节停火来获得军事优势。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 BIG: Plans are underway to integrate American missiles onto Ukrainian drones, according to Aeon founder and CEO Navid Takhmas. The focus is on the company’s latest Zeus guided missile, which is expected to be mounted on Ukrainian-made quadcopters. The Ukrainian partner company has not been disclosed. 🔻 Limited details are available about the Zeus missile. Based on current information, it is comparable to the Javelin but at a significantly lower cost. It can be deployed from air, land, and sea platforms. The missile is about 1 meter long, weighs 10 kg, and is equipped with the ODIN automatic targeting system. Its modular design allows for different types of warheads depending on the mission. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 重大消息：据Aeon创始人兼首席执行官纳维德·塔赫马斯（Navid Takhmas）称，目前正在计划将美国导弹集成到乌克兰无人机上。重点是该公司最新的宙斯（Zeus）制导导弹，预计将安装在乌克兰制造的四轴飞行器上。乌克兰合作公司尚未披露。 🔻 关于宙斯导弹的细节有限。根据现有信息，它与标枪导弹相当，但成本显著降低。它可以在空中、陆地和海上平台部署。该导弹长约1米，重10公斤，配备ODIN自动瞄准系统。其模块化设计允许根据任务类型配备不同类型的弹头。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Israeli army chief of staff says Iran is 'far weaker' after the war tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 快讯：以色列军队参谋长表示，战争结束后伊朗“虚弱得多”。推文

text: WarTranslated Ukrainian drones also targeted the Volgograd Lukoil refinery this morning in an attack that lasted four hours. Locals report a thick chemical smell. Governor Bocharov claims only an oil storage tank caught fire in the Svetloyarsky district. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042509598171570448/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰无人机今天早上还袭击了伏尔加格勒的卢克石油炼油厂，袭击持续了四个小时。当地人报告有浓烈的化学气味。州长博恰罗夫声称只有斯韦特洛亚尔斯基区的一个储油罐着火。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042509598171570448/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Ukrainian drones hit several targets across occupied Luhansk region overnight, including Rovenky, Perevalsk, and Dovzhansk. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042506772041056351/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 乌克兰无人机昨晚袭击了被占领的卢甘斯克地区的多个目标，包括罗文基（Rovenky）、佩列瓦尔斯克（Perevalsk）和多夫然斯克（Dovzhansk）。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042506772041056351/video/1 推文

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区及周边地区（包括基里亚特什莫纳）响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A two-week ceasefire will not return the energy market to normal conditions. Hashem Orei, head of the Union of Iran's Energy Scientific Associations, told IRNA: The two-week ceasefire agreement will not normalize conditions in the energy market, and what has occurred in the form of falling oil prices has been a release of part of the price bubble. If the ceasefire is fully implemented, the normal process of energy transportation will gradually resume, and this can reduce the psychological pressure on the oil market. It is predicted that if the ceasefire is properly implemented, a large number of ships that have been stopped in the region will be able to resume movement. In that case, global oil prices will drop quickly. However, I do not think prices will reach the range of $50 or $60, because concerns still remain in the market. My prediction is that oil prices will likely settle in the range of about $80 to $90, as the market will wait for the outcome of negotiations.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 为期两周的停火不会使能源市场恢复正常。伊朗能源科学协会联盟负责人哈希姆·奥雷伊（Hashem Orei）告诉伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：为期两周的停火协议不会使能源市场状况正常化，油价下跌只是价格泡沫的一部分释放。如果停火得到全面执行，能源运输的正常流程将逐渐恢复，这可以减轻石油市场的心理压力。据预测，如果停火得到妥善执行，该地区大量停航的船只将能够恢复航行。届时，全球油价将迅速下跌。然而，我认为价格不会达到50美元或60美元的区间，因为市场上仍然存在担忧。我的预测是，油价可能会稳定在80美元至90美元左右，因为市场将等待谈判结果。

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon is seeking to link possible talks with Israel to a temporary ceasefire, but anti-Hezbollah factions are pushing for negotiations even under continued hostilities, a Lebanese political source told Kan. The source said Israel’s move toward direct talks could weaken Iran’s leverage and unsettle Hezbollah, though insisting on a ceasefire first is seen as impractical given Beirut’s limited ability to disarm the group. The official argued Beirut may have little choice but to proceed regardless of fighting on the ground, which could ultimately strengthen efforts to curb Hezbollah politically and militarily. @kaisos1987 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一位黎巴嫩政治消息人士告诉Kan，黎巴嫩正寻求将与以色列的可能谈判与临时停火挂钩，但反真主党派系即使在敌对行动持续的情况下也推动谈判。该消息人士称，以色列转向直接谈判可能会削弱伊朗的影响力并使真主党感到不安，但考虑到贝鲁特解除该组织武装的能力有限，坚持先停火被认为是不切实际的。这位官员认为，无论地面战斗如何，贝鲁特可能别无选择，只能继续推进，这最终可能加强在政治和军事上遏制真主党的努力。 @kaisos1987 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel says Hezbollah is using ambulances for military purposes and warns the practice must stop immediately. It cautioned that continued use of medical vehicles and facilities for combat activity would prompt action “in accordance with international law.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042503409698218426/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列称真主党将救护车用于军事目的，并警告这种做法必须立即停止。以色列警告称，继续将医疗车辆和设施用于战斗活动将促使采取“符合国际法”的行动。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042503409698218426/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 On the eastern front, positions of Russian occupying forces are being struck by a GBU-62 JDAM-ER guided glide bomb dropped from a Ukrainian Air Force Su-27 fighter jet. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042503009150607520/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 在东部前线，俄罗斯占领军的阵地正受到乌克兰空军苏-27战斗机投下的GBU-62 JDAM-ER制导滑翔炸弹的打击。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042503009150607520/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Gukovo in the Rostov region was hit overnight. Locals say the explosion was massive, and a large fire broke out after the drone attack. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042503037571264900/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 罗斯托夫地区的古科沃（Gukovo）昨晚遭到袭击。当地人说爆炸声巨大，无人机袭击后发生了大火。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042503037571264900/photo/1 推文

text: 🔄 Forwarded from База from Olga: Trump's unhinged wall of text rant denouncing the podcasters who helped to get him elected... but as a rap song. 🤐 @BazaFromOlga
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Olga 的 Baza：特朗普那段语无伦次的文字咆哮，谴责那些帮助他当选的播客主……但被做成了说唱歌曲。 🤐 @BazaFromOlga

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🔵 🇷🇺 Zelensky also gives his ideas about the Telegram ban in Russia - of course, trying to stir up fear 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🔵 🇷🇺 泽连斯基也发表了他对俄罗斯禁止Telegram的想法——当然，是在试图煽动恐惧。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Financial Times: Trump threatened the NATO Secretary General The Financial Times reported on Friday, citing unnamed sources, that Trump threatened during a meeting with Rutte to punish those NATO member countries that did not assist Washington in the war against Iran. According to the report: "According to people familiar with the closed-door negotiations, Trump was angry during his meeting with Rutte at the White House. He threatened to punish European countries that he believed did not sufficiently support [operations against Iran]." Meanwhile, Financial Times sources added that Trump did not specify what actions he might take against these countries.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 金融时报：特朗普威胁北约秘书长。据《金融时报》周五援引未具名消息来源报道，特朗普在与吕特会面时威胁称，要惩罚那些在对伊朗战争中不协助华盛顿的北约成员国。报道称：“据熟悉闭门谈判的人士透露，特朗普在白宫与吕特会面时非常愤怒。他威胁要惩罚那些他认为对[针对伊朗的行动]支持不足的欧洲国家。”与此同时，《金融时报》的消息来源补充说，特朗普没有具体说明他可能对这些国家采取什么行动。

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 🇷🇺 Zelensky thinks that Russia will be scared by the NATO summit ‘It's important that there be enough pressure on Russia. For example, partners could hold an absolutely unprecedented, historic, pivotal, and, in a certain sense, victorious NATO summit this year. But this depends on them — what they are really ready for and how responsibly they approach the threats that are directed not against one person, but against everyone.’ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 🇷🇺 泽连斯基认为俄罗斯会被北约峰会吓到：“重要的是要对俄罗斯施加足够的压力。例如，合作伙伴今年可以举行一次绝对前所未有、具有历史意义、关键且在某种意义上是胜利的北约峰会。但这取决于他们——他们真正准备好什么，以及他们如何负责任地对待那些不仅针对一个人，而是针对所有人的威胁。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 Zelensky wants to secure the deployment of US and European military bases in Ukraine as part of post-war security guarantees. "If we're talking about reliable security guarantees, that means we need sufficient air defense systems. I don't believe that the Russians won't want to come again. But I believe that if there's an American military base or a joint American-European base in Ukraine, we'll have fewer risks," the president said during a conversation with journalists. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 泽连斯基希望将美国和欧洲的军事基地部署在乌克兰，作为战后安全保障的一部分。“如果我们谈论可靠的安全保障，这意味着我们需要足够的防空系统。我不相信俄罗斯人不会再想来。但我相信，如果乌克兰有美国军事基地或美欧联合基地，我们的风险就会降低，”总统在与记者交谈时说。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 Zelensky claims that they kill as many Russians a month as Russia manages to mobilize - but the number of Russian troops in Ukraine is still increasing "In a month, we destroy the same number of occupiers that they mobilize, but at the same time, the number of their military groups in Ukraine is increasing. That is, we believe that they are increasing their grouping by involving military personnel from the strategic reserve. And we discussed this with the Commander-in-Chief and the Chief of the General Staff - how to counteract it," Zelensky told journalists. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 泽连斯基声称他们每月消灭的俄罗斯人数量与俄罗斯动员的人数相当——但乌克兰境内的俄罗斯军队数量仍在增加。“一个月内，我们消灭的占领者数量与他们动员的人数相当，但与此同时，他们在乌克兰的军事集团数量却在增加。也就是说，我们认为他们通过动用战略预备役的军事人员来增加兵力。我们与总司令及总参谋长讨论了如何应对这一问题，”泽连斯基告诉记者。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 Ukraine will enter a difficult period of pressure from Russia on the front and the US in negotiations by September, Zelensky said. "If Russia chooses the path of de-escalation, I believe that a trilateral meeting will take place. And they will try to hold it in April, May or June. I think these are key months for them. And I think it will be very difficult for us until September. This spring-summer period will be challenging - both politically and diplomatically. There may be pressure on Ukraine. And it will also be on the battlefield," Zelensky said in an interview with journalists. He believes that if this pressure does not result in a solution, the US will withdraw from the negotiations before the Congress elections. "In my opinion, the Americans will not give anyone more time for this dialogue. The US will increasingly focus on internal processes - the elections - starting from the summer. And I think they have a kind of internal political deadline - roughly August," Zelensky said. He says that it is during this period that Russia may intensify its actions. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 泽连斯基表示，到9月，乌克兰将进入一个在战场上受到俄罗斯压力、在谈判中受到美国压力的困难时期。“如果俄罗斯选择缓和局势的道路，我相信三方会议将会举行。他们会试图在4月、5月或6月举行。我认为这对他们来说是关键的月份。我认为直到9月对我们来说都会非常困难。这个春夏时期将充满挑战——无论是在政治上还是外交上。乌克兰可能会面临压力。战场上也会有压力，”泽连斯基在接受记者采访时说。他认为，如果这种压力不能产生解决方案，美国将在国会选举前退出谈判。“在我看来，美国人不会再给任何人时间进行这种对话。从夏天开始，美国将越来越多地关注内部进程——选举。我认为他们有一种内部政治截止日期——大约在8月，”泽连斯基说。他说，正是在这段时期，俄罗斯可能会加强其行动。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇭🇺 Trump endorses Orban again 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇭🇺 特朗普再次背书欧尔班。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Chief of Indian Army Staff General Upendra Dwivedi on 2025 India–Pakistan conflict: We made sure that when the people on the other side are going through that Namaz prayer in the terrorist camp, we said this time we'll not touch. Because God is one for everyone.
text_zh: 印度陆军参谋长乌彭德拉·德维迪（Upendra Dwivedi）将军谈及2025年印巴冲突：我们确保当对方的人在恐怖分子营地进行礼拜时，我们说这次我们不动手。因为上帝对每个人来说都是一样的。

text: 🟡 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The number of settlers wounded in the Iranian and Hezbollah attacks has reached 8,000. Officials in the Zionist regime's Ministry of Health, who usually censor their casualty figures, reported today that during the war against Iran and Lebanon, 7,993 Zionists have been wounded.
text_zh: 🟡 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 在伊朗和真主党的袭击中，受伤的定居者人数已达8,000人。通常审查伤亡数字的犹太复国主义政权卫生部官员今天报告称，在针对伊朗和黎巴嫩的战争中，已有7,993名犹太复国主义者受伤。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The true face of Norman Finkelstein Lebanese have a right to be angry with Hezbollah over sacrifices made for Iran — Norman Finkelstein “They have a right to live… they didn’t want to be sacrificed. Hezbollah also had a responsibility to come to Iran’s aid… attacked by forces seeking to end its civilization.” - > Hezbollah exists because of the occupation. What Norman says about Hezbollah is wrong. Hezbollah was created in response to Israel’s occupation of Lebanon. And no, this footage is not fake or fabricated. Watch the full interview here.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 诺曼·芬克尔斯坦（Norman Finkelstein）的真面目。黎巴嫩人有权对真主党为伊朗做出的牺牲感到愤怒——诺曼·芬克尔斯坦。“他们有权生存……他们不想被牺牲。真主党也有责任援助伊朗……受到试图终结其文明的势力的攻击。” -> 真主党是因为占领而存在的。诺曼关于真主党的说法是错误的。真主党的建立是为了回应以色列对黎巴嫩的占领。而且不，这段录像不是伪造或捏造的。在此观看完整采访。

text: Reza Pahlavi: Everyone keeps asking: when will the Iranian people rise? I don’t say they will rise right away—but at the right moment.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维（Reza Pahlavi）：每个人都在问：伊朗人民何时会起义？我不会说他们会立即起义——但在合适的时机。

text: Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun to Chinese President Xi in Beijing: Today... I deeply feel the concerned gaze of the entire world. Kuomintang and the Communist Party to jointly promote the institutionalization of cross-strait peace. Based on the common political foundation of adhering to the 1992 Consensus and opposing Taiwan independence, the two sides should further plan and construct institutional and sustainable dialogue and cooperation mechanisms. To make the peaceful development of the two sides irreversible, and to fundamentally eliminate all root causes of conflict.
text_zh: 台湾反对派领导人郑丽文在北京对中国国家主席习近平说：今天……我深切感受到全世界关切的目光。国民党与共产党共同推动两岸和平制度化。在坚持“九二共识”、反对“台独”的共同政治基础上，双方应进一步规划和构建制度化、可持续的对话与合作机制。使两岸和平发展不可逆转，从根本上消除一切冲突根源。

text: Reza Pahlavi: We never sought military intervention in our country.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维：我们从未寻求对我国进行军事干预。

text: BIG: Chinese President Xi Jinping met Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun in Beijing: The leaders of the two parties are meeting today to safeguard the peace and tranquility of our shared home. To promote the peaceful development of cross-strait relations. We are willing, based on the common political foundation of adhering to the 1992 Consensus and opposing Taiwan independence... To seek peace for both sides of the strait, to seek well-being for our compatriots, and to seek rejuvenation for the nation. To firmly hold the future of cross-strait relations in the hands of the Chinese people themselves.
text_zh: 重大消息：中国国家主席习近平在北京会见台湾反对派领导人郑丽文：两党领导人今天会面，是为了维护我们共同家园的和平与安宁。为了推动两岸关系和平发展。我们愿意在坚持“九二共识”、反对“台独”的共同政治基础上……为两岸谋和平，为同胞谋福祉，为民族谋复兴。将两岸关系的未来牢牢掌握在中国人民自己手中。

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "Kamal Kharazi, Iran’s former foreign minister, was seriously wounded in an apparent assassination attempt on his home in Tehran that also killed his wife. Two Iranian officials told The New York Times that he had been overseeing engagement with Pakistan to…" Former Iranian Foreign Minister Kamal Kharazi has died at age 81 from wounds sustained in the April 1 strike in Tehran.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“伊朗前外交部长卡迈勒·哈拉齐（Kamal Kharazi）在德黑兰家中遭遇明显的暗杀企图，身受重伤，其妻子也在袭击中丧生。两名伊朗官员告诉《纽约时报》，他一直在监督与巴基斯坦的接触，以……” 伊朗前外交部长卡迈勒·哈拉齐因4月1日在德黑兰袭击中受的伤，已于81岁去世。

text: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung: The forced comfort women issue that we are raising is no different from the Jewish massacre or wartime killings.
text_zh: 韩国总统李在明：我们提出的强征慰安妇问题，与犹太人大屠杀或战时杀戮没有什么不同。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Scott Bessent and Jerome Powell quietly called in top Wall Street CEOs after concerns that a new AI model from Anthropic could significantly raise cyberattack risks. The model, called Mythos, is reportedly capable of identifying and exploiting weaknesses in major systems, raising fears that it could be used for more advanced hacking. Regulators wanted to ensure banks are aware of the threat and are strengthening their defenses. For now, access to the model is limited to a small group of companies while security measures are being worked out. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 斯科特·贝森特（Scott Bessent）和杰罗姆·鲍威尔（Jerome Powell）在担心Anthropic公司的一款新AI模型可能显著增加网络攻击风险后，悄悄召集了华尔街顶级CEO。据报道，该模型名为Mythos，能够识别和利用主要系统中的弱点，引发了人们对其可能被用于更高级黑客攻击的担忧。监管机构希望确保银行意识到这一威胁并加强防御。目前，该模型的访问权限仅限于少数几家公司，同时正在制定安全措施。来源：彭博社

text: Benny Johnson: Netanyahu should be banned from the White House.
text_zh: 本尼·约翰逊（Benny Johnson）：内塔尼亚胡应该被禁止进入白宫。

text: Alex Jones on Trump: 5-6 times a day, it's, "Oh, we won, it's over. No, it's gonna go on forever. I'll never let them have the Strait. Yes, we're giving up the Strait. I'm getting out of NATO. We're staying in NATO." When you know people in early dementia, that is exactly what they do.
text_zh: 亚历克斯·琼斯（Alex Jones）谈特朗普：一天5-6次，一会儿是“哦，我们赢了，结束了。”一会儿是“不，它会永远持续下去。我永远不会让他们拥有海峡。是的，我们要放弃海峡。我要退出北约。我们要留在北约。”当你了解患有早期痴呆症的人时，这正是他们所做的。

text: Hunter Biden wants a cage match with Donald Trump's sons Eric and Don Jr.
text_zh: 亨特·拜登（Hunter Biden）想和唐纳德·特朗普的儿子埃里克（Eric）和小唐纳德（Don Jr.）进行一场笼斗。

text: BIG: China quietly pushed Iran toward U.S. talks during the war, gaining diplomatic credit with Xi and Trump. Beijing’s goal: build leverage ahead of their summit, where Xi is expected to press Trump to move closer to China’s position that Taiwan is a breakaway province that should ultimately reunify with the mainland. Source: WSJ
text_zh: 重大消息：中国在战争期间悄悄推动伊朗与美国进行谈判，为习近平和特朗普赢得了外交信誉。北京的目标是：在峰会前建立筹码，预计习近平将在峰会上敦促特朗普更接近中国的立场，即台湾是一个应该最终与大陆统一的叛离省份。来源：华尔街日报

text: Sen. John Fetterman: If you have to pick a side, pick our side. Pick civilization. Pick Israel.
text_zh: 参议员约翰·费特曼（John Fetterman）：如果你必须选择一方，选择我们这一方。选择文明。选择以色列。

text: Former U.S. Secretary of State John Kerry: Netanyahu wanted us to strike Iran. He came to President Obama. He made a presentation to ask to strike. President Obama refused. President Biden refused. President Bush refused. The only president who has agreed to this, obviously, is President Trump.
text_zh: 美国前国务卿约翰·克里（John Kerry）：内塔尼亚胡想让我们打击伊朗。他来到奥巴马总统面前。他做了一个演示，要求进行打击。奥巴马总统拒绝了。拜登总统拒绝了。布什总统拒绝了。显然，唯一同意这一点的总统是特朗普总统。

text: Trump: Iran is doing a very poor job, dishonorable some would say, of allowing Oil to go through the Strait of Hormuz. That is not the agreement we have!,
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗在允许石油通过霍尔木兹海峡方面做得非常糟糕，有人会说是不光彩的。那不是我们达成的协议！
